Tests for bitwise logic operations using assertions.

# Purpose
This code is a set of assertions that test bitwise operations in JavaScript. It verifies the correctness of bitwise AND (`&`), OR (`|`), XOR (`^`), and NOT (`~`) operations by comparing the results of these operations on specific integer values against expected outcomes. The assertions ensure that the operations produce the correct results, such as `5 & 2` resulting in `0` and `5 | 2` resulting in `7`. This script serves as a simple test suite to validate the behavior of bitwise operators in the JavaScript environment.
